data.title: Document lessons vs lore usage guidelines
data.description:
## Summary

Create concise guidance for when to use `lessons/` versus long-term context storage such as `knowledge/` or lore-style material.

## Context

The workspace now intentionally separates operational behavior constraints from narrative/context memory, but the distinction is not yet documented clearly enough for future autonomous runs.

## Acceptance Criteria

* a short guide is added under `knowledge/`
* the guide is linked from the most relevant workspace docs
* it includes at least three concrete examples covering lesson-only, lore-only, and mixed cases
